results.title: Bonus editorial cartoon for June 24, 2026
results.description: Editorial cartoonist Milt Priggee draws on the unaccountable elites.

results.title: Trump Cancels Housing Bill to Demand SAVE America Act
results.description: President Trump abruptly canceled the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act signing, demanding Congress pass the controversial SAVE America Act first.

results.title: Trump headlining Great American State Fair kick-off celebration on National Mall
results.description: President Donald Trump will take the stage on the National Mall on Wednesday night, launching a multi-day celebration of America’s 250th birthday in the nation's capital.

results.title: Federal judge bars Trump from implementing proof of citizenship requirement to vote
results.description: A federal judge has permanently barred President Donald Trump’s administration from implementing most of his first executive order on elections.

results.title: Moment of Unity: Watch How Ghana vs England Match Brought NDC, NPP MPs Together
results.description: Ghana’s Black Stars drew 0–0 with England in their second Group L fixture at the FIFA World Cup, a result that leaves both sides level on four points The match was marked by rare political unity in the stands, as MPs from both the Majority and Minority caucuses Ghana now turns its attention to a [...]

results.title: Ram mandir donation row | What's the difference between Mahmud Ghazni and Modi-Shah, asks K'taka Cong chief
results.description: Amid the controversy over the allegation of Rs 200-crore financial irregularity in the donations made to Ram Mandir in Ayodhya, Karnataka Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) president B K Hariprasad on Wednesday sought to know how different Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Union Home Minister Amit Shah are from 11th-century invader Mahmud of Ghazni.

results.title: Police disperse ANPA protest with tear gas near National Palace
results.description: Santo Domingo.- The National Police dispersed a protest march by agricultural professionals on Wednesday using tear gas as demonstrators advanced toward the National Palace in demand of better working conditions for the [...]
